Home.subtitle: Satellites, sensors, market data, and AI agents — working together to secure your harvest, reduce costs, and open new markets.
Home.pillar1Desc: Real-time NDVI, soil moisture, and weather data streamed from Sentinel-2 and local sensors — so you always know what your crop needs.
Home.pillar2Desc: From disease detection to optimal selling windows — 18 specialist AI agents analyse your farm and recommend actions with clear evidence.
Home.pillar3Desc: Live CBOT prices, local basis, and 90-day forecasts built into every decision. You farm the land; AgriNexus watches the market.
Home.quoteScenarioLabel: “With real-time satellite data and AI agents, I caught a stripe rust outbreak three days before it was visible from the road. That early warning saved me around €8 000 in fungicide and yield loss this season alone.”
Home.quoteScenarioBody: — Illustrative scenario based on common farming patterns. Actual results vary.
Home.sponsorBody: AgriNexus is supported by a growing network of sponsors, EU grants, and research institutions — so it stays free and independent for every grower.
Home.finalTitle:
Your farm deserves
the same intelligence.
Home.finalSubtitle: It comes turned on, day one. Free. Forever.

Footer.legalDisclaimer: AgriNexus is a farm management and market intelligence platform. All data is provided for informational and educational purposes only, is indicative, and may be delayed, incomplete, or inaccurate. Nothing on this platform constitutes financial, trading, or legal advice.

Academy.metaDescription: Free courses, lectures, and interactive labs on precision farming, satellite imagery, AI agents, and sustainable agriculture.
Academy.heading: Learn the science behind the farm.
Academy.intro: Free, self-paced courses covering precision agriculture, satellite data, AI agents, and sustainable practices. Built with leading agronomists and researchers. Explore the

MarketMeta.title: Market — AgriNexus
MarketMeta.description: Live commodity prices, 90-day forecasts, AI-powered market signals, and selling window optimizer for wheat, corn, and more.

MarketDesk.noAi: Daily market analysis automatically generated by AgriNexus AI agents.
MarketDesk.delayDisclaimer: Prices are indicative and may be delayed by up to 20 minutes. CBOT data sourced via ICE Data Services.
MarketDesk.rowsEmpty: No market data available at this time. Please check back later.
MarketDesk.dataDelayTicker: Data may be delayed. CBOT prices update every 10 minutes during market hours.

Legal.forecastShort: 90-day forecast based on ensemble models. Confidence interval of ±€14 reflects current market volatility. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
Legal.roiExampleBody: This example is for demonstration purposes only and does not represent actual farm data or verified aggregate results. Your actual results will vary based on your specific costs, yields, market timing, and other factors.

Confidence.hintBody: Confidence is derived from the number of correlated data sources, historical accuracy of similar patterns, and the recency of the underlying data.

AgentsMeta.title: Agents — AgriNexus
AgentsMeta.description: AI agents for farming: crop lifecycle, monitoring, operations, business, compliance, and more. Your thinking farm.
